name: rainbow-slices-admin
description: Rainbow Slices Admin - CRM administrativo para negocio de cheesecakes.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:backend && npm run typecheck:frontend
scripts.audit:all: npm --prefix backend audit --audit-level=moderate && npm --prefix frontend audit --audit-level=moderate
